'''Dilbana''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Baxel sector/Legends|Baxel sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]]. Located along the [[Triellus Trade Route/Legends|Triellus Trade Route]], the planet was under a ''de facto'' rulership overseen by [[Jiliac Desilijic Tiron]]. This form of rule ended with the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] Lord's [[Death/Legends|death]] at the hands of [[Durga Besadii Tai]].

{{Planet-stub}}
